{% import "macros/utils.html" as utils %} {# Override of the Goyo theme's toc macro. Pages may carry headings with a `name = ` signature (e.g. the configuration reference's `force_mixdown = `). When a page sets `toc_strip_signatures = true` in its `[extra]` front matter, the "On This Page" sidebar shows just the part before the first `=` (the field name), leaving headings that contain no `=` unchanged. Opt-in per page so that signatures elsewhere (e.g. CLI examples containing `=`) are left intact. The headings themselves and their `{#anchor}` IDs are unaffected — this only changes the sidebar's displayed text. #} {% macro toc(page, lang, config, config_file=false) %} {% if page.toc %} {% set strip_sig = page.extra.toc_strip_signatures | default(value=false) %}

{{ utils::trans_or_default(key="toc_title", default="ON THIS PAGE", lang=lang, config=config, config_file=config_file) }}

    {% for h1 in page.toc %}
  • {% if h1.children %}
    {% if strip_sig %}{{ h1.title | split(pat="=") | first | trim }}{% else %}{{ h1.title }}{% endif %}
      {% for h2 in h1.children %}
    • {% if strip_sig %}{{ h2.title | split(pat="=") | first | trim }}{% else %}{{ h2.title }}{% endif %}
      • {% endfor %}
    {% else %} {% if strip_sig %}{{ h1.title | split(pat="=") | first | trim }}{% else %}{{ h1.title }}{% endif %} {% endif %}
    • {% endfor %}
{% endif %} {% endmacro toc %}
